notes: 2026-06-17 NIGHTLY: MIN_SCORE bug struck AGAIN (6th time). strategy_config.json and trader.py both showed min_score=9, bot logged 'Min score: 9/13' at restart — the June 16 session's claimed fix never landed. FIXED this session by writing directly. CIRCUIT BREAKER: all 8 recent closed trades are losses (kPEPE, AAVE, RUNE×3, ATOM, BNB, AVAX) causing +2 bump, effective MIN=11 — zero trades possible. Those losses occurred BECAUSE wrong MIN_SCORE=9-10 forced 20%/0% WR setups. Circuit breaker punished strategy for a separate bug. FIX: capped circuit breaker max bump +2→+1 (worst case MIN=9, +8.7% EV, not MIN=10, 0% WR). FVG_BEAR_SHORT: -1→-2. Evidence: bearish FVG shorts WR 11% (2W/16L, n=18) — clearly inversely predictive. At -1, score-9 bearish FVG shorts still qualified (9-1=8). At -2, only score 10+ bearish FVG shorts qualify (10-2=8). RULES: (1) never raise min_score based on overall WR — only per-score EV table. (2) Verify with grep after every config change. (3) Circuit breaker max bump = 1, not 2.
